overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage depicting a sunny urban street scene. The clip begins with a stationary first-person view of a city sidewalk and bench, then transitions to third-person perspective following a character with a distinctive mohawk hairstyle walking past construction barriers toward a busy intersection with towering neon-lit buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial city sidewalk with public seating and street traffic

events.description: pedestrian in light blue shirt walks very close to camera, temporarily filling frame

agents.ego_description: standing stationary on the sidewalk near a bench, observing pedestrians and street traffic

notable_agents.action: sitting on concrete bench with distinctive mohawk hairstyle and leather jacket
second person sitting on bench reading a newspaper

entered.detail: long concrete public bench with two occupants sitting
tall curved blue street lamp with dual lights
low metal railing separating sidewalk from street
modern high-rise building with reflective glass facade
elevated highway or monorail structure spanning the street ahead

segments.scene_description: A stationary first-person view of a sunny cyberpunk city sidewalk. Two people sit on a concrete bench to the right while pedestrians walk past and traffic flows on the multi-lane street. Tall glass buildings and an overpass are visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk alongside red construction hoarding approaching intersection

events.description: camera transitions from stationary to walking forward while switching to third-person perspective behind mohawk character
perspective shifts to follow the mohawk character as they stand up from bench and walk away

agents.ego_description: the mohawk character walks steadily along the sidewalk past construction barriers toward the busy intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt and dark pants walking in opposite direction

entered.detail: tall solid red construction hoarding wall running along the left side of sidewalk
large illuminated advertisement screen mounted on building facade
concrete parking structure with multiple open levels

segments.scene_description: The perspective switches to third-person following the mohawk character as they walk along the sidewalk. A red construction barrier runs along the left side while digital billboards and a multi-story parking garage dominate the right. The character approaches the overpass bridge visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot transitions from a stationary first-person observation of a sunny city sidewalk into a third-person perspective following a character through an urban corridor. It begins with a fixed view of pedestrians and traffic flowing past a concrete bench, with tall glass buildings and a distant overpass framing the horizon. As the perspective shifts, the camera pulls back to follow a character with a distinctive mohawk walking along the pavement. The scene then expands to reveal red construction barriers on the left and towering digital billboards and a multi-story parking garage on the right, before continuing forward toward the looming overpass bridge.
